widgets.title: Base Salary Distribution by Last Name
widgets.description: Shows the proportion of total base salary contributed by each last name, limited to the top 10 last names by total base salary.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "last_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("base_salary") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_hr_employees" GROUP BY "last_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Base Salary Over Hire Date
widgets.description: Average base salary of employees aggregated by hire month.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "hire_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, CAST(AVG("base_salary") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_hr_employees" GROUP BY x ORDER BY x ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Bonus Amount Frequency Distribution
widgets.description: Distribution of employees by bonus amount buckets of $5000 increments
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CONCAT('$', CAST(5000 * FLOOR(COALESCE("bonus_amount", 0) / 5000) AS VARCHAR), ' - $', CAST(5000 * FLOOR(COALESCE("bonus_amount", 0) / 5000) + 4999 AS VARCHAR)) AS "bucket", CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS "count" FROM "t_hr_employees" GROUP BY FLOOR(COALESCE("bonus_amount", 0) / 5000) ORDER BY FLOOR(COALESCE("bonus_amount", 0) / 5000) ASC LIMIT 100

widgets.title: Total Base Salary
widgets.description: Sum of all employees' base salaries across the entire dataset.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT 'Total Base Salary' AS label, CAST(SUM("base_salary") AS DOUBLE) AS value, 0.0 AS delta, 'positive' AS sentiment, 'overall' AS delta_basis FROM "t_hr_employees" LIMIT 1

widgets.title: Bonus Amount Volume Over Hire Date
widgets.description: Total bonus amount aggregated by month of hire date to show bonus distribution over time.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "hire_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, CAST(SUM("bonus_amount") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_hr_employees" GROUP BY x ORDER BY x ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Base Salary vs Bonus Amount Correlation
widgets.description: Scatter plot showing the correlation between employees' base salary and their bonus amount.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "job_title" AS "col1", CAST("base_salary" AS DOUBLE) AS "x", CAST("bonus_amount" AS DOUBLE) AS "y" FROM "t_hr_employees" WHERE "base_salary" IS NOT NULL AND "bonus_amount" IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1000

widgets.title: First Name Ranked by Bonus Amount
widgets.description: Sum of bonus amounts grouped by employee first name, showing top 25 first names with highest total bonus.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "first_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("bonus_amount") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_hr_employees" GROUP BY "first_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Total Comp Proportion by First Name
widgets.description: Shows the proportion of total compensation aggregated by employee first name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "first_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("total_comp") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_hr_employees" GROUP BY "first_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 30

widgets.title: Multi-Metric Profile by First Name
widgets.description: Comparison of average tenure, base salary, bonus amount, equity grant, total compensation, performance rating, and promotion count grouped by first name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "first_name" AS axis, CAST(AVG("tenure_years") AS DOUBLE) AS "value" FROM "t_hr_employees" GROUP BY "first_name" ORDER BY "value" DESC LIMIT 12
